'''''Challenge'' 65''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[October]] of [[1992]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Shadow of the Dark Side]]" and was written by [[James B. King]].
